sections.heading: Systemic
sections.content: Systemic therapy for advanced RCC includes immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) combinations with tyrosine kinase inhibitors (TKIs), ICI monotherapy, and TKI monotherapy. Treatment selection is guided by histology (clear cell vs. non-clear cell), risk stratification (MSKCC/IMDC for clear cell), and prior therapy history. For non-clear cell RCC, clinical trials are preferred, and tumor genomic testing is recommended. [KID-D]

cards.name: Axitinib + Pembrolizumab
cards.detail: Setting: First-line metastatic clear cell RCC. Drugs: Axitinib 5 mg Oral Twice daily; Pembrolizumab 200 mg IV Every 3 weeks. Cycle: 21-day cycle for pembrolizumab; axitinib continuous. Key toxicities: Hypertension, diarrhea, elevated alanine aminotransferase. [KID-D]

cards.name: Cabozantinib + Nivolumab
cards.detail: Setting: First-line metastatic clear cell RCC. Drugs: Cabozantinib 40 mg Oral Once daily; Nivolumab 240 mg IV Every 2 weeks.

timeline.title: Adjuvant
timeline.body: Pembrolizumab (category 1) or belzutifan + pembrolizumab (category 2A). Alternatives: Surveillance. Based on KEYNOTE-564 trial showing improved disease-free survival and overall survival. [KID-2]

timeline.title: 1st Line (Clear Cell)
timeline.body: Axitinib + pembrolizumab, cabozantinib + nivolumab, ipilimumab + nivolumab, lenvatinib + pembrolizumab (all category 1). Cabozantinib monotherapy is category 2A preferred for intermediate-/poor-risk. [KID-D] Alternatives: Axitinib + avelumab, pazopanib, sunitinib (all category 2A other recommended). Active surveillance for select favorable-risk patients. [KID-D]

timeline.title: 1st Line (Non-Clear Cell)
timeline.body: Clinical trial (category 2A preferred), cabozantinib, cabozantinib + nivolumab, lenvatinib + pembrolizumab (all category 2A preferred). [KID-D] Alternatives: Erlotinib + bevacizumab (for HLRCC/papillary), everolimus/lenvatinib, ipilimumab + nivolumab, nivolumab, pembrolizumab, sunitinib (category 2A other recommended). [KID-D]

timeline.title: Subsequent (Prior IO)
timeline.body: Axitinib, belzutifan, cabozantinib, everolimus/lenvatinib, tivozanib (all category 2A other recommended). [KID-D] Alternatives: IO/TKI combinations (category 2B useful in certain circumstances) due to limited post-IO data. [KID-D]

timeline.title: Subsequent (IO Naïve)
timeline.body: Axitinib + pembrolizumab, cabozantinib, cabozantinib + nivolumab, everolimus/lenvatinib, ipilimumab + nivolumab, lenvatinib + pembrolizumab, nivolumab (all category 2A other recommended). [KID-D] Alternatives: Axitinib, everolimus, lenvatinib, pazopanib, sunitinib, tivozanib (category 2A useful in certain circumstances). [KID-D]
